summary:
Historian from the National University of Colombia with a strong
background in social project management and data analysis.
Throughout my career, I have developed the ability to manage
complex tasks with precision, cultural sensitivity, and responsibility.
I also completed four semesters of Systems Engineering, gaining
foundational programming knowledge and intermediate Excel
proficiency.
My professional experience includes working at the Road
Maintenance Authority (UAERMV), where I collaborated on the
creation and implementation of Document Retention and Appraisal
Tables in compliance with governmental standards. I also led
Corporate Social Responsibility programmes at Ecoproyectos Aire
S.A.S., partnering with local NGOs and developing community
centred strategies.
In collaboration with Colombia's Ministry of Environment and the
UPME, I contributed to the legal framework for biomass energy
generation by managing research databases and overseeing
information flows. My work as an educator at IDIPRON focused on
restoring fundamental rights and social integration of children and
youth through structured, culturally sensitive interventions.
Currently, I serve as an AML and KYC specialist at DolarApp (and
previously Stripe), where I conduct transaction monitoring, identity
verification, and risk analysis, ensuring regulatory compliance in fast
paced digital environments.
I bring a unique combination of analytical rigour, digital fluency, and
social awareness. Passionate about digital culture, technology, and
ethical communication, I am eager to apply my skills to enhance
the relevance and quality of online content and advertisements,
contributing to a more accurate and inclusive internet experience
